name: 𝙏𝙍𝙄𝘼𝙇𝙎 𝙊𝙁 𝘼𝘾𝘾𝙀𝙋𝙏𝘼𝙉𝘾𝙀
description:
"𝗢𝗻𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝘄𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝗯𝗲 𝗮 𝘀𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗥𝗲𝗽𝘂𝗯𝗹𝗶𝗰.”

For the first time in a millennium, the Jedi Order is forced to break its own traditions. The war has dragged on far longer than anyone predicted. Worlds have burned, supply lines have collapsed, and too many Jedi have fallen holding the front.

The truth became impossible to ignore: the Order no longer has the numbers to protect the Republic.

In a move many would’ve once called sacrilege, the Grand Master proposed an unprecedented solution — open the Temple to outsiders, allow anyone with potential to attempt the Trials, and rebuild the Order from whoever proves themselves worthy.

Centuries of rules overturned in a single decision… yet the Council couldn’t deny the necessity.

So now, the Temple’s grand halls are filled with an unlikely gathering. Refugees. Pilots. Healers. Ex-soldiers. Force-sensitives who slipped through the cracks. And more than a few who clearly have their own motives.

You stand among them — whatever your reason, whatever your past. The path ahead is yours to shape.

But the halls aren’t filled with hopefuls alone.

Unseen by the crowd, a darker purpose has already slipped inside. A Sith assassin — patient, silent, and buried in the farthest shadows — sent by the Dark Council to infiltrate the Temple and eliminate the Jedi leadership before the Order can rebuild.

The stage is set.

The stakes are clear.

And whether you came seeking redemption, power, purpose, or something you haven’t named yet…

You’re already part of the story now.

World's set-up:

This is set during the old Republic,at the tail end of a great war
creator: Fantom4t5
